[Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A New Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 9/5 (Tue)!
Pick-Up Student: 3★ Koyuki

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 9/5 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 9/19 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
